category_sources: Official Typeshare book says it generates type definitions in other languages from Rust definitions.
source_facts.description says typeshare synchronizes type definitions between Rust and other languages for FFI.
display_name_sources: Official 1Password repository title and Typeshare Book use Typeshare casing.
docs_sources: Official Typeshare Book is a dedicated GitHub Pages documentation site for installing and using Typeshare.
source_facts.repo provides the official 1Password GitHub repository README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Typeshare README lists supported languages and examples generating TypeScript, Kotlin, Swift, Scala, Go, and Python definitions.
source_facts.description says typeshare synchronizes type definitions between Rust and other languages for FFI.
